label: trace-payload-ghost-pack-followthrough
topWin: Closed the real online trace-forwarding gap by preserving replay trace evidence through leaderboard normalization and validating optional trace bodies at submit-score.
topGap: The new replay trust smoke could not be run live because sandbox network escalation was not approved.
ignisNote: Audit/implement sprint advanced replay trust from metadata forwarding to validated payload storage and made persistent leaderboard ghosts visible in-run. No new dependencies, secrets, external APIs, or LLM/token spend.
